## Runtime.RuntimeContext.fromLibrary() method

Creates a RuntimeContext wrapping an existing ChocolateLibrary. Use this when you already have a configured library instance.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static fromLibrary(library: ChocolateLibrary, preWarm?: boolean): Result<RuntimeContext>;
```
